title: Maraivaasi
desc: A billionaire's son poses as a regular employee in order to avenge his father's murder.

title: Kadhaludan
desc: When Kalyan falls for Kavitha without revealing his identity, a surprise changes his life.

title: Singaravelan
desc: Velan sets out to find his cousin, Sumathi, with the help of her childhood photograph.

title: Appu
desc: Appu tries to hunt down his sister's murderer, a powerful pimp.

title: Gajendra
desc: A man's family questions him for unabashedly doting on a girl with a mental disability.

title: Arpudham
desc: After getting rejected by Priya, Ashok, a carefree man, resolves to change his life.

title: Pudhu Kudithanam
desc: A mother wants a docile daughter-in-law but her son marries a completely opposite woman.

title: Murattu Kadhal
desc: A pop star is stalked by a fan, whose actions are driven by his troubled childhood.

title: Fillers
desc: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies.

title: Fillers
desc: This is short, engaging segments designed to entertain and inform viewers between programs. They feature a mix of fun, trivia, promos, and interactive content to keep the audience entertained.

title: Vazhve Mayam
desc: Sudhindran Nair drives out his wife Sarala thinking that she is having an illicit affair.

desc: Manju marries Vasudevan but later discovers that he is already married to Uma.

title: Sangamam
desc: A rural folk artist falls in love with a classical dancer but her father disapproves.

title: Sudhandhiram
desc: Based on the film 'Ghulam' by Vikram Bhatt.

title: Saamy
desc: A gangster, Perumal, forces Aarusaamy, a noble police officer, to walk the wrong path.

title: Gulu Gulu
desc: When a fake kidnapping goes awry, a group seeks help from Google, a talented man.
